steps.title: Locate Herodotus's account
steps.content: The passage says Herodotus wrote about 3,000 chambers, white stone pillars, winding passages, and a complex he called "an unending marvel." The credited choice must describe that account, not details the passage never gives.

steps.title: Remove details not stated
steps.content: B adds construction time, C adds a causal claim about prosperity, and D adds an explanation of how Herodotus arranged to see the complex. None of those details appears in the passage. The answer is A.
